title: Sakshi Case Record
description: The single source of truth for a published case record. This is a civic-accountability record of a PUBLICLY REPORTED case, not a substitute for official crime statistics. Victim identity is NEVER ingested: by design there is no field capable of holding a victim/survivor name, age (beyond the boolean minor_involved), address, family, school, workplace, photo, contact, or any re-identifying detail. Dedup and matching are case-anchored (FIR/CNR/station/district/date/court), never on identity. additionalProperties:false at every object level makes forbidden fields impossible.

id.description: Deterministically assigned, never reused. SKS-{4-digit year}-{2-letter STATE code}-{6-digit zero-padded serial}.

cnr.description: Court Case Number (CNR) from eCourts/NJDG when available. Used for exact-match dedup.

fir_ref.description: First Information Report reference. Used for case-anchored dedup, never for identity.

state.description: 2-letter Indian state/UT code (e.g. TG, AP, MH, DL, KA, TN, UP, WB).

incident_reported_date.description: Date the case was publicly reported/registered. Full ISO YYYY-MM-DD for non-minor cases; truncated to YYYY (year only) when minor_involved is true (POCSO s.23). The conditional below enforces the right granularity per case.

category.description: Sexual-offence category. This record tracks SEXUAL offences only; "other" means an OTHER SEXUAL offence (e.g. stalking, voyeurism, disrobing under BNS Chapter V) — never a non-sexual crime. Non-sexual cases are rejected at extraction (in_scope=false) and, as a second layer, quarantined at dedupe when offence_sections carry no qualifying BNS/POCSO/IPC sexual-offence section.

minor_involved.description: Whether a minor is involved. This is the ONLY age-related fact stored; no actual age is ever recorded (POCSO Act s.23).

status.description: Current judicial status per public court records. Presumption of innocence applies; ACQUITTED and QUASHED are rendered with equal prominence.

status_history.description: Chronological status changes. Each entry cites a source by integer index into sources[].

date.description: Full ISO YYYY-MM-DD for non-minor cases; truncated to YYYY-MM when minor_involved is true (day precision is not stored for a minor). Enforced by the conditional below.

source.description: Zero-based index into this record's sources[] array.

accused.description: Accused persons. An accused is presumed innocent until proven guilty. Names are stored ONLY when present in an official court record.

name_public_court_record.description: Accused name ONLY when it appears in an official court record (judgment/order/cause list). null for media-sourced cases; the UI then shows "Withheld (media-sourced, not yet in court record)".

next_hearing.description: Next hearing date if scheduled, else null. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

pending_days.description: Days the case has been pending, for accountability surfacing. MUST be null when minor_involved is true (a day-precise derivation is not stored for a minor).

title.description: Short plain-English factual title (<=90 chars), no sensationalism. Model-written for non-minor cases; for a minor case it is generated DETERMINISTICALLY by pipeline.sanitize from allowed non-identifying fields only (enforced by the conditional below).

summary.description: Plain-English neutral summary (<=2 sentences), no victim details. When minor_involved is true BOTH title and summary are generated DETERMINISTICALLY by pipeline.sanitize.project_minor_record from allowed fields only (enforced by the conditional below); the model-written narrative is never published for a minor case.

sources.description: Citable public sources. Nothing without a citable public source is published.

source_type.description: Provenance class, assigned deterministically from the source. A record whose ONLY sources are live_blog is capped below the publish threshold and quarantined for human confirmation (a rolling live-updates page is not durable provenance for a permanent public claim).

retrieved.description: Date the source was retrieved. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence 0..1. Records below 0.8 are quarantined to data/_review/ and never auto-published.

last_verified.description: Date this record was last verified against sources. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

verified.description: True if the grounding verifier (guardrail L) confirmed every field against the source and re-checked scope. Absent/false means not verified (auto mode publishes only verified records).

verification_note.description: Short verifier note (corroboration found, or the reason it demoted/corrected). Contains NO victim details.

allOf.description: Phase 0 / POCSO s.23: a minor case is stored at the reduced granularity produced by pipeline.sanitize.project_minor_record. This is the SECOND independent layer (the first is the sanitizer) — a non-projected minor record fails validation and never ships. All referenced properties already exist above, so additionalProperties:false is unaffected.

summary.pattern: Identifying details are withheld by law \(POCSO s\.23\)\.$

examples.title: Sexual assault case involving a minor — TESTVILLE (2026)
examples.summary: The case is under trial in TESTVILLE, TG. Reported 2026. Identifying details are withheld by law (POCSO s.23).
